name: Scrumptious Butterscotch Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt morsels and butter, stirring occasionally. This takes about 20 minutes.
2. Stir in the crumbs and nuts. Divide the mixture into two parts.
3. Press half of the mixture onto the bottom of a well-greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
4. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until light. Gradually add the evaporated milk, then vanilla and egg. Beat well.
5. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the crumb mixture. Smooth until even.
6. Sprinkle the remaining crumb mixture on top.
7. Press lightly with the palm of your hand.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until set. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack. Chill before cutting.
